text: There is a certain quiet anticipation in this clean, modern environment. The reflections and glass give a sense of transparency, as though ideas here are meant to flow freely. Stepping forward into the vibrant space dedicated to research and development, I feel inspired. These walls speak of human curiosity and our urge to shape the world, yet also remind me of the distance between invention and understanding. In this place, I am both observer and seeker—a participant in the never-ending dialogue between what we know and what we strive to become.
